mapper.insert: INSERT INTO commercial_invoices ( ci_code, po_id, ci_invoice_date, client_id, currency_id, ci_total_amount, ci_status, ci_client_name, ci_client_address, ci_country, ci_currency_code, ci_items_snapshot, ci_linked_documents ) SELECT #{ciId}, po_id, CURRENT_DATE, client_id, currency_id, po_total_amount, '발행대기', po_client_name, po_client_address, po_country, po_currency_code, po_items_snapshot, po_linked_documents FROM purchase_orders WHERE po_code = #{poId}
